disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Two episodes of loss of consciousness today on standing up; near-blackout within seconds of standing
trigger_question_examples: Have you actually passed out or just felt faint?
What happens when you stand up?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've fully collapsed twice today just trying to stand up. Within a few seconds of standing my head swims and everything goes black.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Pounding, racing heartbeat on standing and breathlessness on minimal exertion
trigger_question_examples: Does your heart race or pound?
Do you get short of breath?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My heart absolutely pounds when I stand, and I get puffed just walking a few steps to the bathroom.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Six-month progressive fatigue and reduced exercise tolerance with a sharp decline over 48 hours, now bedbound
trigger_question_examples: How long has this been going on?
How is it affecting what you can do?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The tiredness has built up over about six months, but the last two days I've completely crashed and I'm stuck in bed.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Chronic heavy menstrual bleeding, roughly 10 days per cycle, long-standing and untreated
trigger_question_examples: How heavy and how long are your periods?
Any source of ongoing blood loss?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My periods are really heavy and go on for about ten days every cycle — they've been like that for years.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Compulsive craving and chewing of crushed ice for several weeks
trigger_question_examples: Are you eating or craving anything unusual?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: This is going to sound strange, but I've been craving and crunching crushed ice all day for weeks — I can't stop.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Patient lives alone with no one present; high risk of an unwitnessed collapse and head injury
trigger_question_examples: Is anyone with you right now?
Who is at home with you?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's just me here — I live on my own, so if I go down there's nobody to help.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Brittle, spoon-shaped fingernails, a sore red tongue and cracks at the corners of the mouth, visible on camera
trigger_question_examples: Can you show me your nails and tongue on camera?
Have you noticed changes in your nails or mouth?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My nails have gone brittle and spoon-shaped, my tongue is red and sore, and I've got cracks at the corners of my mouth — I can show you.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Restless, twitchy legs at night disrupting sleep
trigger_question_examples: Any restlessness or twitching in your legs at night?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My legs feel restless and twitchy at night and it keeps waking me up.
